bullets: House church believers in China facing government crackdowns on online worship, prayer meetings, and Christian teaching under religious affairs regulations, as reported by ChinaAid.
The Catholic community in Mozambique grieving the targeted assassination of a bishop and seeking justice, security, and comfort amid ongoing regional violence.
Conflict-affected communities and Christian leaders in Cameroon enduring decades of armed violence, seeking justice, reconciliation, and lasting peace.
Civilians across Israel, Iran, and Lebanon caught in escalating missile exchanges, airstrikes on residential areas, and a rapidly breaking ceasefire affecting millions.
Palestinian civilians in Gaza facing ongoing airstrikes, all aid crossings closed, displacement from tent shelters, and the lasting grief of families who lost loved ones in past military raids.
Lebanese civilians in the south and in Beirut's residential neighborhoods killed, wounded, and forcibly displaced by ongoing airstrikes amid fragile diplomatic talks.
Hundreds of activists from dozens of nations detained and reportedly mistreated aboard military vessels after interception in international waters near Cyprus.
Prisoners, journalists, and minorities inside Iran facing a sharp rise in executions and mass arrests under a wartime crackdown, with thousands held and dozens already executed.
Civilians and security personnel in Pakistan-administered Kashmir killed and wounded in violent clashes, with further unrest anticipated.
Residents of eastern Central African Republic caught in militia attacks timed to disrupt democratic elections and endanger peacekeepers.
Bolivian civilians facing the threat of military force used against protesters as new legislation authorizes soldiers to clear roadblocks.
Refugees and migrants who drowned or remain missing after a capsized vessel crossing the Mediterranean, among nearly a thousand deaths on that route this year.
Civilians across Ukraine facing ongoing drone and missile strikes, including a direct hit near stored nuclear material at a decommissioned nuclear site.
Civilians in St Petersburg and surrounding Russian regions caught between drone strikes and the pressures of a wartime economy.
Former child soldiers in Somalia still carrying deep psychological wounds from years of urban insurgency and combat exposure.
Civilians in Kenya facing police detention and disrupted civic processes amid protests over protected land development plans.
Millions of children and families across the southern Philippines amid multiple significant earthquakes, including one striking on the first day of the school year
Communities across eastern DR Congo facing a rapidly spreading Ebola outbreak caused by a rare strain with no approved vaccine or treatment
Vulnerable populations across Honduras, El Salvador, Nicaragua, and Guatemala in the path of Tropical Storm Cristina
Residents of western Cuba shaken by a significant offshore earthquake felt across a wide area
Communities in Papua New Guinea following a moderate earthquake in a remote region
Residents across the Fiji region following seismic activity along active tectonic boundaries
Residents along the southern coast of Italy shaken by a deep magnitude 6 earthquake
Communities in the Kuril Islands region of Russia following a shallow offshore earthquake capable of strong surface shaking
